reference: Hi, since your child has had abdominal pain for five months, the possibility of a chronic infection like tuberculosis is very likely. Additionally, renal stones or a urinary tract infection can also cause chronic abdominal pain. The swollen lymph nodes point to an infectious cause. If I were treating you, I would recommend some investigations such as a complete blood count with erythrocyte sedimentation rate, Mantoux test, urine routine microscopy and culture, ultrasound of the abdomen, and X-ray of the kidneys, ureters, and bladder. I suggest you conduct the above investigations as soon as possible since they are necessary for diagnosis. I hope this has helped you. If you have any more questions, I will be happy to help you.
